response: Veda Hlubinka-Cook was a software programmer at Brøderbund in the 1980s and was the model for one of the characters in Jordan Mechner's game "Prince of Persia." She designed and created the computer game "D/Generation" and was technical director for "The Last Express." In the 1997 video game *The Last Express*, which takes place on the Orient Express, days before the start of World War I, she was involved in the development of the game, as she was a key contributor to its creation.
